summary: Hydrated live state shows all three job candidate PRs are already closed. The original representative #41517 is obsolete as a canonical merge path; the Google same-provider prefix bug is covered by the closed canonical issue #71932 and the landed fix referenced there (#91125 / commit 3e4b10fa1cc5d7739de89a563d8088b9e762af35). Current target main at 6aa83374d90d35226b9cf3577155c3876a91b4b3 contains the Google transport prefix stripping and regression coverage, so no new fix PR or close action is needed. #41398 is security-sensitive in the hydrated artifact and is routed only to central security handling.
